Off Calendar Feb-15-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ronald Arlas, Esq., Wright, Finlay & Zak, 415-246-1062 Ext. 2012, appearing by Courtcall for defendant and moving party Fannie Mae. Patrick L. Hurley, Esq., Manning & Kass et al, 415-217-6990, for defendant and moving party New Beginnings. Gabriel D. Zeldin, Esq., Steyer, Lowenthal, Boodrookas, 415-421-3400, for defendant and moving party First American Title Company. No appearance by plaintiff.

The moving party appeared and the Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Defendant New Beginnings Realty Specialist Demurrer To 1st Amended Complaint is sustained without leave to amend. Property in Solano County.Complaint is incomplete and signature missing. Prevailing party to prepare order. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay. Not reported.
